svg.title: lmml harness integration architecture
svg.desc: Three-layer diagram showing coding harnesses (OpenCode, Claude Code, Continue) connecting via OpenAI-compatible HTTP to lmml's current TUI-managed server on port 1200, with future detached profile ports reserved for multi-instance work. The server is backed by GGUF models and CUDA GPU. Each integration requirement is labeled on the connection paths.
svg.text: Required behaviours: streaming (SSE) · long request timeout (7200s) · chunk timeout (300s) · stable base URL per profile
lmml runtime manager (process group · PID tracking · stale cleanup · orphan prevention)

g.text: selected per profile · VRAM fit checked
selected per profile · VRAM fit checked
CUDA GPU · ngl -1 auto · sm_37 → sm_100a · shared across profiles
